user.title: Storage Add-on Connection
user.description: Enter the URL of the Storage add-on (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8099). The integration will poll the REST API to expose sensors, a shopping todo list, and services.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Storage add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.

add_to_shopping_list.name: Add to shopping list
add_to_shopping_list.description: Add a product to the Storage shopping list.

consume_stock.name: Consume stock
consume_stock.description: Consume N of a product from stock (FIFO).

run_optimize.name: Run AI optimize
run_optimize.description: Trigger the Storage AI optimize background job.
